name: venviewer-trainer-a100-cu124
readme:
Venviewer trainer — gsplat 1.5.3 on PyTorch 2.4.1 + CUDA 12.4 for A100 80GB.

On boot:
  1. /opt/bootstrap.sh runs (decoded from CMD): pulls the trainer code from OMNITWIN_GIT_REPO @ OMNITWIN_GIT_REF, snapshots the git SHA/branch/remote into /workspace/code/.git_*, writes rclone.conf for R2, then exec's bash.
  2. Operator opens an SSH or web terminal into the pod.
  3. Operator runs /opt/verify_build.sh and confirms the JSON output (gsplat 1.5.3, CUDA 12.4, A100 80GB visible).
  4. Operator runs /opt/run_training.sh with the desired flags per infra/runpod/RUNBOOK.md.

No persistent volume — R2 is the storage layer. Container disk 80GB covers one venue's colmap_v2 + depth priors + bundle output.

Do not enable spot/interruptible until run_training.sh checkpoint-resume has been validated end-to-end.
